prompt: Plot a 20-period simple moving average of the close.

Plot the VWAP for the current session.
Plot a fast 10-period and a slow 30-period simple moving average of close.
Create a lower study plotting RSI with length 14 and horizontal lines at 70 and 30.

Plot a stochastic oscillator with length 14 as a lower study with 80 and 20 reference lines.
Plot the CCI with length 20 as a lower study.
Plot Williams %R with length 14 as a lower study.
Plot a 10-period momentum oscillator of the close as a lower study.
Plot Bollinger Bands with a 20-period basis and 2 standard deviations.
Plot the Average True Range with length 14 as a lower study.
Plot Keltner Channels with a 20-period basis and a 2x ATR multiplier.
Plot the 20-period standard deviation of the close.
Plot the highest high and the lowest low over the last 20 bars.
Plot volume as a histogram, colored green when above its 20-period average and gray otherwise.
Plot relative volume: the current volume divided by the 20-day average volume.
Plot VWAP and color the price bars green when the close is above VWAP.
Plot On Balance Volume as a lower study.
Find stocks where the 9 EMA crossed above the 21 EMA today.
Scan for stocks with RSI below 30.
Scan for stocks where the close is above the highest high of the prior 20 bars.
Scan for stocks trading above their 200-day simple moving average.
Scan for stocks whose volume today is at least 2 times their 20-day average volume.
Scan for stocks where the MACD line crossed above its signal line.
Scan for stocks that gapped up at least 2 percent at the open versus the prior day's close.

Color the price bars green when the close is above the 20 EMA and red when below.
